a:r.a:t: My role and responsibilities are clearly defined.
I know what strong performance looks like in my position.
I understand how my role contributes to the overall sales process.
I can describe the value proposition to my customer.
My compensation reflects the effort I put in.
I am comfortable with my mix of commissions vs. bonus pay.
My earnings potential is competitive with other companies in my industry.
My compensation plan encourages the right behaviors.
I understand how my compensation and incentives are structured.
My compensation plan motivates me to perform at a high level.
My compensation plan document clearly communicates plan details.
My quota target is fair and aligns with my assigned leads or territory.
